'''nek''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sea|sea]]". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-?-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sea|sea]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || næ?ïfkïfth || næ?ïfkïfj || næ?ïfkïfsh || næ?ïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || na?ïf?ïfkïfth || na?ïf?ïfkïfj || na?ïf?ïfkïfsh || na?ïf?ïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || na?ïfkïfth || na?ïfkïfj || na?ïfkïfsh || na?ïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || na?ïffkïffth || na?ïffkïffj || na?ïffkïffsh || na?ïffkïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || na?ïfkïfïf || na?ïfkïfïf || na?ïfkïfïf || na?ïfkïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || na?ïfkïfth || na?ïfkïfj || na?ïfkïfsh || na?ïfkïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || na?ïfkïfïfl || na?ïfkïfïfl || na?ïfkïfïfl || na?ïfkïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || na?ïfkïfïfïf || na?ïfkïfïfïf || na?ïfkïfïfïf || na?ïfkïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || na?ïfkïfïfn || na?ïfkïfïfn || na?ïfkïfïfn || na?ïfkïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || na?ïfkïfïforo || na?ïfkïfïforo || na?ïfkïfïforo || na?ïfkïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b480631}}
